title: heterotheca latisquamea
intro: Heterotheca latisquamea, also known as the broad-leaved goldenweed, is a perennial plant in the sunflower family native to the Great Plains region of North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The broad-leaved goldenweed is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Heterotheca latisquamea is often used in the form of tinctures, infusions, or salves, and is said to be effective in treating skin issues and soothing irritated tissues.
